title: Charity Christmas Cards - Stag Adorned with Winter Foliage with Foil Details - Eco-Friendly - Pack of 6 Cards - By Art Beat
features: BEAUTIFUL CHARITY CHRISTMAS CARDS: A pack of six festive Christmas cards sold in aid of Shelter, suitable for sending a kind, heartfelt message to special friends, neighbours and family.

BRANDED PREMIUM QUALITY CARDS: These cards are manufactured by Art Marketing, an esteemed and highly respected UK card company, renowned for creating innovative and attractive designs, on high quality board, finished to an excellent standard.
GREETING: The greeting inside each card reads "Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year".
LOVELY ARTISTIC DESIGN: featuring a regal stag with a festive wreath in his antlers, and gold foil detailing . Each card comes with a coordinating envelope.
SHELTER: is a housing and homelessness charity, who believe that everyone should have a home. They support more than one million people a year, who go to them for advice and support.
ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Reassuringly, these cards will not harm our precious planet. They are eco-friendly and sustainable, using paper and ink from responsibly managed sources.

STUNNING CARDS: Each of these attractive Christmas cards will let someone special, or a loved one, know that they are in your thoughts and that you want to send them festive wishes at this special time of year. Receiving a card always makes someone feel good, giving them a warm feeling to know that someone has taken the time to select a card especially for them.
